query: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.crmConnected, t.webhookActive, o.isActive as oauthActive, o.lastRefreshedAt, o.lastError FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN ghl_oauth_tokens o ON t.id = o.tenantId WHERE t.crmConnected = 'true' AND t.id < 1020000;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, t.crmConnected, t.webhookActive, o.isActive as oauthActive, o.lastRefreshedAt, o.lastError FROM tenants t LEFT JOIN ghl_oauth_tokens o ON t.id = o.tenantId WHERE t.crmConnected = 'true' AND t.id < 1020000;
